app.name: hbario
app.description: hbario — agentic payments on Hedera. A payment-gated commerce agent built on the Hedera Agent Kit (LangChain plugins, RETURN_BYTES / human-in-the-loop mode) that exposes its own Hedera Payments MCP server so other agents can hire it programmatically.

agent_kit.name: hedera-agent-kit
agent_kit.description: Used to plan and emit unsigned Hedera transactions which are signed by the user's wallet (WalletConnect / HIP-820). The server never holds private keys.

supported.name: validateAccount
supported.description: Validate a Hedera account ID format.

supported.name: getAccountBalance
supported.description: Get the HBAR balance of a Hedera account.

supported.name: estimateTransferFees
supported.description: Estimate the network fee for a single HBAR transfer.

supported.name: estimateBulkPayoutFees
supported.description: Estimate the total network fee for a bulk payout.

supported.name: prepareHbarTransfer
supported.description: Prepare an HBAR transfer instruction for user approval. Does NOT execute.

supported.name: prepareBulkPayout
supported.description: Prepare a bulk payout instruction for user approval. Does NOT execute.

supported.name: verifyTransaction
supported.description: Verify a transaction against expected details.

supported.name: getTransactionReceipt
supported.description: Get the receipt for a completed transaction.
